message:
fix(lint+safety): apply formatting, fix zero-division guards in 12 modules

Formatting: line wrapping for long expressions, struct variant
compression, method chain formatting normalization.

Safety fixes:
- sharded_counter: clamp shard_count to min 1 to prevent division by zero
- aegis_entropy_anomaly: clamp ErrorDensityTracker window_size to min 1
- network_reliability: use Error::other() API, Duration::from_secs(1)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
